summary: Great show but the recording would benefit from a board mix to create a fuller‑sounding matrix.
review: The reviewer rates the performance highly, calling it a great show, yet suggests that pairing this tape with a soundboard source would produce a richer matrix recording. No specific songs or band member details are mentioned, so the praise is general.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; reviewer loves the show but notes recording could be improved with a board mix, indicating good musical quality but only fair technical quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer wishes for a soundboard addition to achieve a fuller matrix sound, implying the current source lacks depth/clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; reviewer simply describes the show as great.
